zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Henry Yelverton於1526年出生在英國諾福爾可盧加姆時，他的父親William Yelverton IV, Esq24歲，母親Lady Anne Fermour24歲。他於1556年與Bridget Adrian Drury在英國素福爾可結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1601年4月26日在英國倫敦享年75歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Henry Yelverton于1526年出生在英国諾福爾可盧加姆时，他的父亲William Yelverton IV, Esq24岁，母亲Lady Anne Fermour24岁。他于1556年与Bridget Adrian Drury在英国素福爾可结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1601年4月26日在英国倫敦享年75岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Yelverton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Devon): habitational name from either of two places called Yelverton, in Norfolk or Devon. Medieval examples of the surname are from the Norfolk place, but the modern surname in Britain is associated mainly with Devon, where the earliest record of the surname is found in 1761, and is probably a substitution for Elford , an earlier form of the Devon placename. The Devon place, a hamlet in Buckland Monachorum, is not officially on record as Yelverton until the 19th century, when the Great Western Railway so named the station it built there in 1859. It is a dialect pronunciation of Elverton, which is first recorded in 1765 as an extended form of its medieval name Elford + -ton ‘town’. The Norfolk placename is recorded as Ailuertuna in 1086, and probably derives from the Old English personal name Æthelfrith or Geldfrith + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Elford
meanings: English: habitational name from Yelverton in Buckland Monachorum (Devon), recorded as Elleford in 1291 (see Yelverton ), named from the Old English personal name Ella or elle, ellen ‘elder tree’ + ford ‘ford’. The name may also derive from any of the places called Elford in Staffordshire and Northumberland, both probably from the Old English personal name Ella + ford.

variants.name: Yelvington
meanings: Probably an altered form of English   Yelverton  .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Henry Yelverton was born in 1526, in Rougham, Norfolk, England, his father, William Yelverton IV, Esq, was 24 and his mother, Lady Anne Fermour, was 24. He married Bridget Adrian Drury in 1556, in Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 26 April 1601, in London, England, at the age of 75, and was buried in London, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Henry Yelverton est né en 1526, à Rougham, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, William Yelverton IV, Esq, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Lady Anne Fermour, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Bridget Adrian Drury en 1556, à Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 26 avril 1601, à Londres, Angleterre, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Henry Yelverton 1526 in Rougham, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Yelverton IV, Esq 24 und seine Mutter Lady Anne Fermour 24. Er hat 1556 in Suffolk, England Bridget Adrian Drury geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 26. April 1601 im Alter von 75 Jahren in London, England und wurde in London, Middlesex, England begraben.

Lui sposato Bridget Adrian Drury nel 1556, nel Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 26 aprile 1601, nel London, England, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolto a London, Middlesex, England.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Henry Yelverton(이)가 1526년 영국 노르폴크 루그함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Yelverton IV, Esq(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Anne Fermour(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1556년 영국 수폴크에서 Bridget Adrian Drury(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1601년 4월 26일 영국 런던에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry Yelverton nasceu em 1526, em Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Yelverton IV, Esq, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Lady Anne Fermour, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Bridget Adrian Drury em 1556, em Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 26 de abril de 1601, em London, Inglaterra, com 75 anos, e foi sepultado em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Henry Yelverton родился в 1526 г. в местности роугам, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени William Yelverton IV, Esq было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Anne Fermour, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Bridget Adrian Drury в 1556 г. в местности суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 26 апреля 1601 г. в местности Лондон, Англия в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Henry Yelverton nació en 1526, en Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, William Yelverton IV, Esq, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Lady Anne Fermour, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Bridget Adrian Drury en 1556, en Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 26 de abril de 1601, en London, Inglaterra, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultado en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
